name: Automate competitor research with Exa AI, Notion and multi-agent analysis
description: Searches for competitors of a given company using Exa web search, scrapes each competitor website with Firecrawl, runs multi-agent AI analysis for company overview, product offerings, and reviews, then saves structured profiles to Notion and reports to Slack.

source.originalName: Automate competitor research with Exa.ai, Notion and AI agents

exaKey.description: Exa connection key for competitor search

firecrawlKey.description: Firecrawl connection key for scraping competitor websites

notionKey.description: Notion connection key for saving competitor profiles

slackKey.description: Slack connection key for report delivery

sourceCompany.description: Company name to find competitors for (e.g. 'Stripe')

sourceCompanyUrl.description: Company website URL (optional, helps with better search)

notionParentPageId.description: Notion parent page ID to store competitor profiles

slackChannel.description: Slack channel for competitor research report

maxCompetitors.description: Maximum number of competitors to analyze

steps.name: Build Exa query to find competitors
Parse competitor list from Exa results
Compile all competitor data for analysis
Build Claude prompt for multi-agent competitor analysis
Build Slack Block Kit competitor report
